untranslatable_reason: Signal requires swing-level structural analysis (downswing length > preceding upswing length, swing high/low comparisons, multi-timeframe rejection patterns) which cannot be expressed with bar-level indicators alone. Requires custom swing detection logic not available in standard indicator set.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using volatility expansion (true_range > atr_14) and lower lows (close < prev_low) as proxies for downswing extension and rejection. However, the core logic—measuring downswing length against preceding upswing length and detecting lower timeframe rejections—requires swing point tracking and hierarchical timeframe analysis beyond the allowed indicator vocabulary. THRESHOLD_NEEDED parameters for downswing_length_ratio_minimum and confirmation_timeframe_divisor remain undefined in source signal and cannot be inferred.
